title: Remove Toyota Crysta and Urbania from fleet showcase

requirements.text: Remove Toyota Crysta from the fleet showcase section in FleetShowcase.tsx, eliminating its card, image reference, and all associated display information
acceptanceCriteria: Toyota Crysta is no longer displayed in the fleet showcase grid
No broken image references for Crysta remain in the component
The fleet showcase grid displays only three remaining vehicles (Dzire, Kia Carens, Etios)

requirements.text: Remove Urbania from the fleet showcase section in FleetShowcase.tsx, eliminating its card, image reference, and all associated display information
acceptanceCriteria: Urbania is no longer displayed in the fleet showcase grid
No broken image references for Urbania remain in the component
The fleet showcase maintains proper responsive grid layout with remaining vehicles

constraints: Do not modify the FleetShowcase component structure beyond removing the two specified vehicles
Preserve the existing grid layout and styling for the remaining fleet vehicles
nonGoals: Adding new vehicles to replace the removed ones
Modifying other sections of the application
